reviews.comment:
Buena atención, ir temprano porque siempre hay fila para cargar combustible. Servicios sanitario. Lugar para desayunar.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, go early because there's always a line for fuel. Restrooms available. Breakfast area.

reviews.comment:
El acceso al lugar es muy complejo, incomodo y un poco peligroso cuando quedas sobre Colon, aunque está bastante bien organizado por el personal y te atienden relativamente rápido, también para destacar la amabilidad del personal y el asesoramiento al turista

(Translated by Google)
Access to the place is very complex, inconvenient and a little dangerous when you're on Colon, although it's quite well organized by the staff and they attend to you relatively quickly, also worth highlighting the friendliness of the staff and the advice to tourists
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlenJ5UDd3RRAB
